title: eurybia chapmanii
intro: Eurybia chapmanii, also known as Chapman's aster, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Eurybia chapmanii include reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as having antimicrobial properties that can aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, Eurybia chapmanii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
